WENDY'S #4450

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: March 3, 2026

A · 99/100 · safer than 87% of Orange County restaurants we grade

Few Orange County kitchens score higher than WENDY'S #4450 — an A at 99/100, safer than 87% of Orange County restaurants we grade.

Its latest inspection on March 3, 2026 cited 1 basic violation. Diners give it 3.8 across 1,619 reviews.

Get directions Call (407) 273-8523
